metadata.description: Vinyl jazz fixture with scratched surface noise and impulses.
Vinyl classical fixture with hiss / HF-noise and bandwidth limitation.
Worn vinyl rock fixture with dropouts, clicks, and high-frequency noise.
Reel tape fixture with annotated dropout and tape HF loss/noise.
Cassette fixture with wow/flutter and tape noise.
Low-bitrate MP3 fixture with codec artifacts and bandwidth loss.
Streaming fixture with packet-loss style glitches and codec residue.
Vocal/choir fixture where HF noise is expected while breath material must remain a context marker.
